body:
https://sdk.meltano.com/en/v0.44.1/stream_maps.html#aliasing-a-stream-using-alias

```yml
config:
  stream_maps:
    databasename-table_name:
      __alias__: table_name
```

produces

```
singer_sdk.exceptions.RecordsWithoutSchemaException: A record for stream 'databasename-table_name' was encountered before a corresponding schema
```

This issue was fixed upstream (https://github.com/meltano/sdk/pull/2589) and was available from SDK version [`0.39.1`](https://github.com/meltano/sdk/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#v0391-2024-08-07), but the target is on [`0.22.0`](https://github.com/z3z1ma/target-bigquery/blob/73a468a8f720918112ddd8c170c2da65f11db6d4/poetry.lock#L1860-L1869). This forces use of [`meltano-map-transfomer`](https://hub.meltano.com/mappers/meltano-map-transformer/) as a workaround.
title: bug: Stream aliasing does not work with `stream_maps`
